target:
Wow… Shinpei…
You've grown so much…

We'll talk later…
Go see Mio.

(It's the same after all.
It was like this when I got off the ferry earlier,
and when I saw Mio's bicycle…)
(Everyone's moving and talking the same way as in my dream…)

(This isn't just deja vu or a prophetic dream…
It's something way beyond that)

(If this keeps going like this…
It means that shadow exists…)

(What if Ushio was killed by a shadow?!
And Mio too…)

You okay?
Your face is all pale…

Sorry…
I'll go get some fresh air…

(The bicycle Mio fell into the sea with
had a broken brake…)

(The brake wire had a cut mark…
Like someone tampered with it)

(If that was done to kill Mio…
What if it was someone's trap?)

(This is crazy… I can't understand…
I can't handle this!)

(Wait… Did I just hear something
from the house…?)

(Mio…?
Why is she wearing a uniform…)

(Wh-what the hell was that…?
The shadow got up!!!)

Hm…
I'm Totsumura Tetsu… 34 years old…

What…?
What was that just now!?

You're in trouble, Shinpei-kun.
When did you get here?

Alright, caught.
Mio, take care of her too.

You're so cruel.
You should do it yourself.

Eavesdropping's not allowed, Shinpei-kun.
You're sentenced to death!

Take that girl to the mother.
She's a cute girl, she might like it.
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_KAO_MAKIKOMI>Kaori gets involved…</color>] was acquired.
